nodes.name: Fetch Active PRO and INFINITY_PLUS Users

parameters.query: SELECT id, email, name, "planType" FROM "User" WHERE "planType" IN ('PRO', 'INFINITY_PLUS') AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT b.id, b.title, b.organ, b.state, b.city, b.modality, b."estimatedValue", b."openingDate", b."pdfUrl", p.name as "portalName" FROM "Bidding" b JOIN "Portal" p ON b."portalId" = p.id WHERE b."createdAt" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND b.status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY b."openingDate" ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50

main.node: Fetch Active PRO and INFINITY_PLUS Users
